data.title: WELL Health Supports Ontario’s Commitment to a Provincewide Primary Care Medical Record System
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, and Toronto, Well Health Technologies Corp (TSX: WELL) has announced its support for the Ontario government's new provincewide Primary Care Medical Record system. Well Health is a digital healthcare company aiming to improve health outcomes through technology for healthcare practitioners and patients worldwide. The company has confirmed its intention to participate actively in the upcoming project.

data.title: THE SAN FRANCISCO PENINSULA LAUNCHES FLAVORS OF THE PENINSULA, CELEBRATING THE REGION'S DIVERSE CULINARY LANDSCAPE
data.description: From March 20 to 30, 2026, a 10-day culinary event will spotlight the diverse food offerings across San Mateo County, from Bayside to Coastside. Diners can enjoy prix-fixe menus and attend special events organized by the official Destination Marketing Organization for the region, San Francisco Peninsula. This initiative aims to celebrate the vibrant food scene in the area and attract visitors to experience the local gastronomy.

data.title: Dogecoin Flips Bullish After Elon Musk Video, But Shiba Inu Skyrockets 5%
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) turned bullish after weeks as Shiba Inu (SHIB) rose by nearly 5% following Elon Musk's sharing of an AI-generated video where he depicted as "The Dogefather" petting a Shiba Inu dog. Musk presented the AI video on Thursday, humorously mimicking a scene from the "Godfather" movie while discussing Doge's wedding and private keys. Musk commonly refers to himself as the "Dogefather," a term he first used during his 2021 "Saturday Night Live" appearance and frequently since then to promote Dogecoin. He also hinted at a Department of Government Efficiency acronym that hinted at the canine-themed coin. Last month, Musk announced SpaceX's plan to potentially send the memecoin to the moon next year. Meanwhile, X Money, a new payments feature... (remaining content not included)

data.title: JBM Exclusively Lists Eagle Bend - An 80 Home BTR Forward Sale Opportunity in North Port, FL (Sarasota MSA)
data.description: In Naples, Florida, on March 20, 2026, JBM® Institutional Multifamily Advisors announced the exclusive listing of Eagle Bend, an 80-home Build-to-Rent community located in North Port, FL. This unique offering presents the opportunity to purchase the entire community consisting of duet-style, concrete block homes.

data.title: Hunter Nation Praises Department of Interior for Unleashing Hunters on Frontlines of Conservation in Nation's Parks
data.description: In a recent development on March 20, 2026, in Mission, Kansas, Hunter Nation, a leading advocate for hunters in the country, marked a significant achievement with a new initiative by the Department of the Interior (DOI) and National Park Service (NPS). This pioneering program aims to involve hunters extensively in conservation efforts. The initiative will see a substantial increase in the participation of hunters in the conservation process, showcasing their critical role in this important endeavor.
